title: festuca scoparia subsp. lutea
intro: Festuca scoparia subsp. lutea is a subspecies of the grass-like plant Festuca scoparia, also known as yellow fescue, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca scoparia subsp. lutea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Festuca scoparia subsp. lutea can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
